overall.description: Cinematic drone flight through a futuristic cyberpunk city canyon in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera descends steadily between two massive illuminated megastructures connected by a skybridge, transitioning from twilight to the artificial glow of the deep urban canyon.

agents.ego_description: flying forward and downward between two massive skyscrapers in a futuristic city

entered.detail: tall curved residential tower with illuminated windows forming the left wall of the canyon
tall curved residential tower with illuminated windows forming the right wall of the canyon
horizontal connecting bridge spanning between the two towers high above the street
cluster of futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background between the towers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude view between two massive curved megastructures in a futuristic city. The camera descends steadily through the narrow aerial corridor, with the skybridge visible in the distance and the city skyline visible beyond. Warm artificial lights glow from the building windows against the cool blue dusk sky.

events.description: entering deeper shadow as the canyon walls block ambient twilight
passing underneath the skybridge connecting the two towers

agents.ego_description: continuing descent through the narrowing canyon, passing the skybridge level

entered.detail: streaks of vehicle headlights visible on the street far below on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the camera descends deeper into the canyon, ambient light fades and artificial window lights become dominant. The skybridge looms closer overhead before passing behind the camera, while the tower walls close in on both sides. Vehicle light trails become visible on the distant street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep canyon base with dense window lighting

events.description: approaching the canyon floor where building windows and neon provide the only illumination

agents.ego_description: flying deep between the towers where building windows and neon lights dominate the view

entered.detail: smaller buildings and street-level structures becoming visible at the canyon bottom

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera deep within the urban canyon, where no natural light reaches. The megastructures tower closely on both sides with dense patterns of illuminated windows. The camera approaches the street level where neon signs and building entrance lights mark the canyon floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent through a futuristic urban canyon, transitioning from the cool twilight of the upper atmosphere to the dense, artificial glow of the city floor. It begins at a high altitude between two massive curved megastructures, gliding through a narrow aerial corridor where warm window lights contrast with a deep blue dusk sky. As the camera sinks deeper into the canyon, the natural light fades and the towering walls close in, passing beneath a looming skybridge while vehicle light trails emerge on the distant street below. The scene then shifts into total artificial illumination as the camera reaches the depths of the urban chasm, where no natural light remains. Finally, the movement concludes near the canyon floor, approaching a landscape of vibrant neon signs and brightly lit building entrances.
